description: Foundation mountain pose family. Develops foot awareness, upright posture and basic breath integration. Entry point to Vinyasa Krama.
Intermediate mountain pose variations. Expands into arm movements, balance and lateral extensions from the centred standing base.
Advanced mountain pose family. Includes full arm balances, deep hip openers and complex vinyasa transitions from Tadasana.
therapeuticFocus.primaryBenefit: Full body integration and advanced balance

description: Warrior and triangle family for beginners. Builds hip flexibility, leg strength and introduces asymmetric standing work.
Intermediate warrior sequences with extended holds and revolved variations. Deepens hip opening and builds endurance.
Wide-legged standing poses for beginners. Builds inner thigh flexibility, grounding and introduces symmetric standing work.
Foundational balance poses. Develops ankle stability, hip alignment and single-leg strength. Cultivates focus and mental steadiness.
Fundamental seated poses for hip and hamstring preparation. Includes forward folds, simple twists and grounding seated postures.
Intermediate seated practice. Deeper forward bends, lateral stretches and more complex hip openers with pranayama integration.
therapeuticFocus.primaryBenefit: Deep hip mobility and spinal flexibility

description: Restorative and accessible lying-down poses. Ideal for beginners, cool-down or therapeutic practice. Includes bridge, knee-to-chest and Savasana.
therapeuticFocus.primaryBenefit: Relaxation, hip release and nervous system restoration

description: Intermediate supine work including wheel pose, deep backbends and supine twists. Strengthens the spine and opens the chest.
Foundational prone poses. Builds back strength, introduces backbends and develops proprioception. Includes cobra, locust and child's pose as rest.
Gentle inversions for beginners. Introduces legs-up-the-wall, supported bridge and half shoulderstand. Builds confidence for full inversions.
Shoulder stand and supported inversions. Builds shoulder stability, stimulates the thyroid and provides deep reversal of gravitational flow.
Advanced inversions including headstand and arm balances. Requires strong shoulder base and core stability. Profoundly energising.
therapeuticFocus.primaryBenefit: Mental clarity and full inversion mastery

description: Seated meditation poses for beginners. Gentle hip openers leading into comfortable meditative sitting with pranayama and breath awareness.
Introductory backbend sequence. Builds spinal flexibility, chest opening and prepares the body for deeper backbend work.
Classic triangle and lateral extension sequences. Develops side body flexibility, hip strength and introduces the triangle family of poses.
Classical Surya Namaskar A for beginners. Integrates breath with movement and introduces the foundational vinyasa flow of Vinyasa Krama.
Kneeling pose family. Develops quadriceps flexibility, ankle mobility and the kneeling base for many advanced postures.
Progressive hip opening toward Padmasana. Introduces external hip rotation and prepares the knees and ankles for lotus position.
therapeuticFocus.primaryBenefit: Hip external rotation and lotus preparation
